title: murraya omphalocarpa
intro: Murraya omphalocarpa, also known as the Green Lemon or Green Citrus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to tropical Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Murraya omphalocarpa include its potential to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
